content_body: I just spent 4 days at Echoes by the Lake with girlfriends. We had planned on going out to dinners and touring, but this cabin ( it really is a 5-star home) was so beautiful and nestled in the mountains with a great view of the lake that we didn't want to leave. We cooked in and had a wonderful time barbecuing, sitting by the fire pit, in the hot tub, and in front of the fire . This is a perfect place to relax and share time with friends. Nicole was wonderful, and we appreciate all she did to make this a perfect getaway. Thank you!
title: The Perfect Place to Relax
